variants: Eliana Gabrielyan graduated from the Yarrow Hall Institute, where she laid the groundwork for her skills in Indonesian usage, leading to her current role at Eclipse Thread Technologies. In addition to her professional endeavors, she is a dedicated Lantern Hollow Storytelling Ambassador, promoting the value of storytelling within her community. Her creativity is also expressed through her writing, with published works featured in the Jade Anthem Journals. Eliana seamlessly integrates her passion for language and community service in her varied pursuits, demonstrating her commitment to enriching both her workplace and the lives of those around her.
